coverage: representative slice of the shipped 229-quality vocabulary: 48 qualities (24 curated + 24 extra), 2 samples each
improvement_over_previous: Enriching the impact pool (23 -> 37 phrases, more per family) MEASURABLY improved variety 0.66 -> 0.79 (93/96 answers distinct); overall 0.88 -> 0.89. The goal of this iteration (variety) was achieved.
verdict: Variety improved meaningfully over the prior 0.66 (93/96 distinct answers, 88/96 distinct openers, 28 distinct trailing clauses). But the two targeted impact-fixes are probabilistic, not guaranteed: introspection/artistry now CAN use the better phrases (they are in the distribution) but the 2-sample draw landed on other plausible impacts, so the judge did not see the intended phrases.
weaknesses: NEW issue found: tautologies — 'your perspective gave us perspective' and honesty -> 'kept us honest' echo the quality in the impact. Next target: drop self-referential impacts for the matching quality.
3 byte-identical sample pairs remain (persistence, prudence, intelligence) — within-quality variety still imperfect.
introspection/artistry intended phrases ('deepened our understanding', 'made it beautiful') are in the per-quality distribution but did not surface in this draw.
raw model output is all-lowercase (the web app prettifies for display).
note: LLM-as-judge on the actual shipped model. Deterministic appropriateness reads 0.995; the judge's stricter 0.90 appropriateness / 0.89 overall is the honest figure. The variety gain is the measured win this iteration; the tautology finding is the honest next target. Not a capability-class claim.
